acceptance_criteria.text: The deployments page displays a Status column showing current state
A tooltip shows GPU, CPU, and Memory allocation when hovering over resource labels
The API rate limits requests to 100 per minute per user with proper server response codes
The interface provides an intuitive and user-friendly experience for managing deployments
The table shows a Queue column with expandable row details for each deployment
The backend rate limiting enforces 50 requests per second per API key
Users can toggle feature visibility via a dropdown menu in the toolbar
